name: jp-menswear-workflow
description: Japanese menswear six-step workflow with orchestrator and reusable skills.

interface.shortDescription: One entry point for trends, validation, SKU selection, sourcing, same-style confirmation, and material packs.
interface.longDescription: A reusable plugin entry for the Japanese menswear workflow. Includes six connected skills for trend analysis, multi-source validation, SKU selection, supplier sourcing, same-style confirmation, and final material-pack delivery.
defaultPrompt: Run the full Japanese menswear six-step workflow
Continue the current Japanese menswear project from the correct step
Step 6 only: build a direct-to-publish material pack from a product link and skip Steps 1-5 unless I explicitly ask for them
